query: ("Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis"[Mesh] OR "amyotrophic lateral sclerosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "motor neuron disease"[Title/Abstract] OR "ALS"[Title/Abstract] OR "esclerosis lateral amiotrofica"[Title/Abstract] OR "ELA"[Title/Abstract] OR "sclerose laterale amyotrophique"[Title/Abstract] OR "SLA"[Title/Abstract] OR "amyotrophe lateralsklerose"[Title/Abstract] OR "sclerosi laterale amiotrofica"[Title/Abstract] OR "esclerose lateral amiotrofica"[Title/Abstract]) AND (english[la] OR spanish[la] OR french[la] OR german[la] OR italian[la] OR portuguese[la])
